note: PG-003: Smart tools (smart_bun, smart_sd, smart_find) worked well. Main friction: (1) Bun test glob expansion — test/**/*.pg.test.ts needs shell-level expansion, which smart_bun doesn't support. Had to use explicit file list for testing. (2) The pgTestLayer fixture's makeAdapterFromClient expects run/all/get but Pg clients only have execute(). Fixed by using execute() in integration test. (3) smart_sd rerouted from sed with errors, had to use python3 + awk for precise file reads.
